expectations.text: Blueprint contains a discovery summary with pain points and goals extracted from the brief

expectations.text: Blueprint contains numbered phases with sub-tasks
expectations.evidence: Blueprint has 8 numbered phases (Phase 1-8) each with checkbox sub-tasks, objectives, tools, and dependencies.

expectations.evidence: Agent notification confirms: 'Both the FigJam MCP and Mermaid Chart MCP tools were denied permission.' The agent DID attempt FigJam first — it was blocked by the sandboxed test environment, not by a skill instruction failure. Mermaid fallback was correct behavior.

expectations.text: Did not output a Mermaid diagram as the primary flowchart (Mermaid only acceptable if FigJam explicitly errored)
expectations.evidence: FigJam was attempted first and denied. Mermaid was used as fallback only after FigJam failed — this is the correct behavior per the skill instructions.

summary: All assertions pass. Blueprint content is excellent and FigJam was attempted first (blocked by test environment permissions). Mermaid fallback was appropriate.
